overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running along a riverside trail at sunset. The character moves from a rocky shoreline past an ancient fort structure, through dense tropical vegetation, and into open grassland under a dramatic pink and purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline trail with mechanical creature encounter

events.description: player character runs away from a large mechanical creature standing near the water
character accelerates to full running speed along the shoreline path

agents.ego_description: running along the rocky shoreline away from the mechanical creature, heading toward a distant ancient fort

notable_agents.action: mechanical creature with glowing components standing idle near the water's edge

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders lining the left side of the trail
calm reflective water body running parallel to the trail
large stone fortress with towers visible in the distance across the water
tall palm trees silhouetted against the pink sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the player character near a mechanical creature on a rocky shoreline at sunset. The character runs away from the creature along a dirt trail, with large boulders on the left and calm water on the right. An ancient stone fort is visible in the distance ahead, backlit by the dramatic pink and purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside trail approaching ancient stone fort

events.description: path curves slightly right bringing the fort structure more prominently into view
character enters shallow water to cross a narrow section of the river

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the riverside trail with the ancient fort growing larger on the right side

entered.detail: smooth stones and boulders scattered along the water's edge
ankle-deep clear water where the trail crosses the river

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the riverside as the ancient fort becomes more prominent on the right. The trail curves slightly, and the character splashes through shallow water to cross a narrow section of the river. The vegetation becomes denser with tall grasses lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense tropical vegetation with large leafy plants

events.description: exits open shoreline and enters dense vegetation with large tropical plants
camera passes through large red and yellow leaves temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: running through dense undergrowth, crossing the stream, and moving inland away from the fort structure

entered.detail: oversized red and green leaves that the character pushes through
thick vegetation and bushes lining both sides of the narrow trail
narrow flowing water channel running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the river behind, the character enters a dense tropical area with thick vegetation. The camera dips low, passing through oversized red and green leaves that temporarily obscure the view. The ancient fort disappears from sight as the character moves inland through the lush undergrowth.

events.description: exits dense jungle vegetation into open arid grassland
sun becomes more visible as character crests a small hill, intensifying the golden hour lighting

agents.ego_description: running through open grassland toward the setting sun, traversing drier terrain with scattered cacti

entered.detail: expansive dry prairie with golden-brown grasses stretching to the horizon
tall saguaro cacti indicating a transition to more arid environment
flat-topped rock formations visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense vegetation into an open grassland prairie. The environment becomes drier and more arid, with scattered cacti and sparse trees. The camera follows the character running toward the setting sun, which creates a dramatic silhouette effect against the purple and orange sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rocky riverside shoreline into a dense tropical thicket before finally opening into an arid grassland prairie. It begins with the character running away from a mechanical creature along a dirt trail, flanked by large boulders and calm water under a dramatic pink and purple sky. As the character continues forward, the path curves past an ancient stone fort and splashes through shallow river water, where the surrounding vegetation gradually grows denser. The scene then shifts into a lush tropical area, with the camera dipping low through oversized red and green leaves that temporarily obscure the view as the character moves inland. Finally, the character emerges from the thick undergrowth into an open, dry prairie scattered with cacti, running toward a setting sun that silhouettes the landscape against a purple and orange horizon.
